concept.description: Express Bounded Context dependencies as graph
concept.cypher: MATCH (boundedContext1:JMolecules:DDD:BoundedContext), (boundedContext2:JMolecules:DDD:BoundedContext), (boundedContext1)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(boundedContext2) WITH boundedContext1, boundedContext2, d as Weight RETURN boundedContext1 AS Source, Weight, boundedContext2 AS Target
